title: ADK-402: Enterprise Integration & MCP
author: Google Cloud
description: Deploy production agents connected to Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, configure OAuth2 integrations, and execute securely inside virtualized sandboxes.

features.title: Model Context Protocol
features.description: Connect agents to standardized database APIs and documentation repositories using MCP tool hosts.

features.title: OAuth Security
features.description: Configure secure token handshakes and user identity redirection flows for enterprise systems.

features.title: Virtualized Sandboxes
features.description: Deploy agent loops within sandboxed container environments using distrobox and isolated OCI nodes.
